sf_ppr.name: Superflex PPR
sf_ppr.qb_premium: QBs worth 30-40% more than 1QB. Elite QBs (Allen, Maye, Daniels) are #1-5 overall assets.
sf_ppr.key_rule: 2nd QB spot dramatically inflates QB value. Never have zero at QB.

1qb_ppr.name: 1QB PPR
1qb_ppr.qb_premium: QBs valuable but not top assets. RBs and elite WRs dominate top 5.
1qb_ppr.key_rule: Positional scarcity at RB drives value more than SF.

tep.name: TE Premium
tep.te_value: TEs worth 20-30% more. Elite TEs (Bowers, McBride) become top 10 assets.
tep.key_rule: Brock Bowers becomes a top 3-5 overall asset in TEP+SF.

idp.name: IDP (Individual Defensive Players)
idp.key_positions: Edge rushers and linebackers most valuable. Safety/CB value varies by scoring.
idp.key_rule: Adds defensive player market completely separate from offense.

contract.name: Contract/Salary Cap Dynasty
contract.key_rule: Players have salaries and contract years. Cutting a player incurs dead cap. Value = production vs contract. Overpaid aging veterans are massive liabilities.
contract.strategy: Target players on rookie contracts. Avoid overpaying for aging stars in free agency.

window_definitions.contending: High dynasty value (50k+), young avg age (<27). Peak window NOW.
window_definitions.peaking: High dynasty value, older avg age (28+). Window closing — 2-3 years max.
window_definitions.competing: Solid value (40-50k), healthy age. Contention window open.
window_definitions.rebuilding: Low value, young avg age (<26). 2-4 year build.
window_definitions.declining: Low value, old avg age (28+). No clear path forward.

te: New HC/OC who uses TE (Shanahan, Reid systems)
Cleared path to targets (released WR/TE above them)
High target share in pre-season role
